## Steak

Follow this chart initially:

<img style="width: 480px;" src="data:image/png;base64," data-filename="Picture1.png">

Verify doneness with meat thermometer:
- Rare: 120° to 125°F -- Center is bright red, pinkish toward outside.
- Medium Rare: 130° to 135°F -- Center very pink, slightly brown toward outside.
- Medium: 140° to 145°F -- Center light pink, outer portion brown.
- Medium Well: 150° to 155°F -- No pinkness.
- Well Done: 160°F and above -- Uniformly brown throughout.

Allow steak to rest up to 10 minutes before serving, to distribute juices and finish cooking.
